title: Data-stream allocation method for link aggregation and related devices
abstract: Provided are a data-stream allocation method for link aggregation and related devices. The method includes the following. A first peak transmission rate of each of at least two wireless network modules is obtained (301) at a current time point, where the at least two wireless network modules are in link aggregation status. A data-stream allocation weight for each of the at least two wireless network modules is determined (302) according to the first peak transmission rate of each of the at least two wireless network modules. Perform (303) data-stream allocation for the at least two wireless network modules according to the data-stream allocation weight of each of the at least two wireless network modules.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) AĂ‚Â data-streamĂ‚Â allocationĂ‚Â methodĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â linkĂ‚Â aggregation,Ă‚Â comprising: obtainingĂ‚Â (301,Ă‚Â 409)Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â peakĂ‚Â transmissionĂ‚Â rateĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â eachĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â twoĂ‚Â wirelessĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â modulesĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â electronicĂ‚Â deviceĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â currentĂ‚Â timeĂ‚Â point,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â twoĂ‚Â wirelessĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â modulesĂ‚Â beingĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â linkĂ‚Â aggregationĂ‚Â status; determiningĂ‚Â (302,Ă‚Â 410)Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â data-streamĂ‚Â allocationĂ‚Â weightĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â eachĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â twoĂ‚Â wirelessĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â modulesĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â peakĂ‚Â transmissionĂ‚Â rateĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â eachĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â twoĂ‚Â wirelessĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â modules;Ă‚Â and performingĂ‚Â (303,Ă‚Â 411)Ă‚Â data-streamĂ‚Â allocationĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â twoĂ‚Â wirelessĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â modulesĂ‚Â accordingĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â data-streamĂ‚Â allocationĂ‚Â weightĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â eachĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â twoĂ‚Â wirelessĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â modules.
